title: BlocksCreate
description: Create fully custom blocks for Minecraft using only JSON files, no coding required.
body:
# BlocksCreate

BlocksCreate is a mod that lets you create fully custom blocks without writing a single line of Java code. All you need are JSON files inside a within the mod's own resources.

---

Web Site
https://blockscreate.crewved.com/

Support Discord
[https://discord.gg/CrewVed](https://discord.gg/3cmdp4f7NC)

---

## What can you do?

- **Create custom blocks** with their own 3D model, textures, physics and sounds
- **Pre-generate variants** of blocks (stairs, slabs, walls, fences, octaves and more)
- Define everything through **simple JSON**, no programming required
- Support for **water-loggeable** blocks, light emission, configurable collision and more
- Rotation, slipperiness, speed and jump factor configurable per block

---

## Requirements

| Requirement | Version |
|-------------|---------|
| Minecraft   | 1.20 / 1.20.1 |
| Mod Loader  | Forge |
| Minecraft   | 1.21 / 1.21.1 |
| Mod Loader  | Fabric |
